body:
Promoted from spec: .orbit/specs/2026-05-07-orbit-state-v0.1/spec.yaml

Goal: Ship orbit-state v0.1 — Rust + SQLite + MCP substrate per decision 0015, with bd verb parity for single-repo workflow, dogfooded in orbit repo itself, 4-week budget.

Cards advanced by this work: 0008 (.orbit/ folder), 0017 (setup), 0020 (orbit-state), 0021 (tasks).

Spec is the canonical source of truth — bead acceptance field is the thin checklist; full ACs with verification, halt conditions, escalations, and kill conditions live in the spec.yaml.

Reviews: review-spec-2026-05-07-v3.md (APPROVE).
